sayings.text: The smallest spark can light the darkest night.
sayings.author: Elias Thornwood
sayings.imagePrompt: Create a cinematic inspirational quote card in vertical format: a lone glowing spark rising from an ancient lantern in a vast starry night sky over a misty mountain valley, warm golden light contrasting deep indigo and black tones, subtle rays of hope piercing the darkness. Overlay the exact text centered in elegant bold serif font with soft golden glow and subtle shadow: "The smallest spark can light the darkest night." Attribution in smaller elegant script at the bottom: "— Elias Thornwood, 1892". High-quality motivational atmosphere, soft cinematic lighting, warm vintage tones, minimalist yet dramatic. High resolution, clean text rendering, no distortions.

sayings.text: A steady hand builds what haste destroys.
sayings.author: Miriam Calder
sayings.imagePrompt: Vertical inspirational quote card: a calm artisan’s hand carefully placing the final stone on a beautifully crafted stone arch bridge spanning a serene river at sunrise, soft morning mist and golden light. Centered overlay in clean bold serif typography with warm white color and gentle drop shadow: "A steady hand builds what haste destroys." Smaller attribution below: "— Miriam Calder, 1921". Peaceful, timeless aesthetic with soft natural lighting and earthy tones. High resolution, clean text rendering, no distortions.

sayings.text: Kindness returns on wings you cannot see.
sayings.author: Father Luca Benevento
sayings.imagePrompt: Square motivational quote image: a gentle white dove carrying a small glowing heart in its beak flying over a peaceful sunlit meadow filled with wildflowers, soft pastel sky. Centered elegant calligraphy-style serif font in soft rose and gold: "Kindness returns on wings you cannot see." Attribution in delicate smaller text at bottom: "— Father Luca Benevento, 1784". Warm, uplifting, ethereal lighting. High resolution, clean text rendering, no distortions.

sayings.text: The roots that grip the earth feed the tallest tree.

sayings.imagePrompt: Vertical quote card: majestic ancient oak tree with powerful visible roots gripping rocky soil, lush green canopy reaching toward a bright blue sky with soft sunlight filtering through leaves. Centered bold elegant serif text in deep forest green with golden outline: "The roots that grip the earth feed the tallest tree." Smaller attribution below: "— Old Man Willow, 1847". Nature-inspired, serene and powerful atmosphere. High resolution, clean text rendering, no distortions.

sayings.text: Patience is the quiet bridge between dream and dawn.

Centered sophisticated serif font in warm ivory with subtle shadow: "Patience is the quiet bridge between dream and dawn." Attribution in smaller elegant text: "— Lady Evelyn Hart, 1913". Dreamy, hopeful cinematic lighting with soft pastels. High resolution, clean text rendering, no distortions.

sayings.text: Wisdom grows where questions are planted.
